channel.title: SpeakForWater
channel.description: Making water resources research accessible to everyone. Join Anna and Ehsan as they discuss the latest open-access papers on hydrology, flood management, remote sensing, and water engineering — explained in plain language for farmers, water managers, and anyone who cares about water.
channel.itunes:author: Ehsan Kahrizi

item.title: Ep 12: Modeling surface water and groundwater mixing and mixing-dependent denitrification with bedform dynamics
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 12: Modeling surface water and groundwater mixing and mixing-dependent denitrification with bedform dynamics. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://hess.copernicus.org/articles/30/1221/2026/hess-30-1221-2026.pdf

item.title: Ep 11: Synergistic impact of simultaneously assimilating radar- and radiometer-based soil moisture retrievals on the performance of numerical weather prediction systems
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 11: Synergistic impact of simultaneously assimilating radar- and radiometer-based soil moisture retrievals on the performance of numerical weather prediction systems. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://hess.copernicus.org/articles/30/1261/2026/hess-30-1261-2026.pdf

item.title: Ep 10: How does integrating multi-scale monitoring and compound-specific isotope analysis improve the evaluation of S -metolachlor degradation in agro-ecosystems?
item.description: SpeakForWater Episode 10: How does integrating multi-scale monitoring and compound-specific isotope analysis improve the evaluation of S -metolachlor degradation in agro-ecosystems?. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research. Original paper: https://hess.copernicus.org/articles/30/1291/2026/hess-30-1291-2026.pdf

item.title: Ep 9: Climate change effects on river droughts in Bavaria using a hydrological large ensemble
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 9: Climate change effects on river droughts in Bavaria using a hydrological large ensemble. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://hess.copernicus.org/articles/30/1165/2026/hess-30-1165-2026.pdf

item.title: Ep 8: Novel insights into deep groundwater exploration by geophysical estimation of hard rock permeability
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 8: Novel insights into deep groundwater exploration by geophysical estimation of hard rock permeability. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://hess.copernicus.org/articles/30/1309/2026/hess-30-1309-2026.pdf

item.title: Ep 7: Towards a typology for hybrid compound flood modeling
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 7: Towards a typology for hybrid compound flood modeling. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://hess.copernicus.org/articles/30/1397/2026/hess-30-1397-2026.pdf

item.title: Ep 6: Future changes in seasonal drought in Australia
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 6: Future changes in seasonal drought in Australia. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://hess.copernicus.org/articles/30/1463/2026/hess-30-1463-2026.pdf

item.title: Ep 5: Integrated Sediment Yield Estimation and Control in Erosion-Prone Watersheds: A Systematic Review of Models, Strategies, and Emerging Technologies
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 5: Integrated Sediment Yield Estimation and Control in Erosion-Prone Watersheds: A Systematic Review of Models, Strategies, and Emerging Technologies. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4441/18/6/751/pdf?version=1774252486

item.title: Ep 4: Ecological Selection of Anammox Bacteria Driven by Endogenous Carbon in a Low-Oxygen SBR Biofilm System Without External Carbon Addition
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 4: Ecological Selection of Anammox Bacteria Driven by Endogenous Carbon in a Low-Oxygen SBR Biofilm System Without External Carbon Addition. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4441/18/6/752/pdf

item.title: Ep 3: Integrated Assessment of Water Resource Carrying Capacity: Dynamics, Obstacles, Coordination and Driving Mechanisms in the Gansu Section of the Yellow River Basin, China
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 3: Integrated Assessment of Water Resource Carrying Capacity: Dynamics, Obstacles, Coordination and Driving Mechanisms in the Gansu Section of the Yellow River Basin, China. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4441/18/6/761/pdf?version=1774276288

item.title: Ep 2: Navigating Water (In)Security in Pakistan-Occupied Jammu and Kashmir (POJK)
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 2: Navigating Water (In)Security in Pakistan-Occupied Jammu and Kashmir (POJK). A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://doi.org/10.3390/w18070768

item.title: Ep 1: Minute 330 of the US–Mexico Water Treaty: A Testament to Transboundary Cooperation Amidst Drought in the Colorado River Basin
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 1: Minute 330 of the US–Mexico Water Treaty: A Testament to Transboundary Cooperation Amidst Drought in the Colorado River Basin. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://doi.org/10.3390/w18070775
